ai_summary: This document is a routine compliance filing from Amanta Healthcare Limited under SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018, specifically Regulation 74(5), for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. It confirms that their Registrar and Share Transfer Agent has processed all securities received for dematerialization within the prescribed timelines, including confirmation, cancellation, and updating of the register of members. This indicates good corporate governance and regulatory adherence regarding share transfers, with no material impacts or red flags identified.
